description.en: A single flour, sorghum, bound with a psyllium husk gel and lifted with yeast plus a touch of baking powder for insurance. Mild and slightly sweet, it needs a long, full cool before slicing or the crumb turns gummy, like most gluten-free psyllium loaves.
description.de: Ein einziges Mehl, Sorghum, gebunden mit einem Flohsamenschalen-Gel und mit Hefe plus einer Prise Backpulver zur Sicherheit gelockert. Mild und leicht süß, braucht es vor dem Anschneiden eine lange, vollständige Abkühlzeit, sonst wird die Krume klebrig.
description.es: Una sola harina, sorgo, ligada con un gel de cáscara de psilio y leudada con levadura más un toque de polvo de hornear de refuerzo. Suave y algo dulce, necesita enfriarse por completo antes de cortarlo o la miga queda pegajosa, como casi todo pan de psilio.
description.fr: Une seule farine, le sorgho, liée par un gel de psyllium et levée à la levure avec un soupçon de levure chimique en renfort. Doux et légèrement sucré, il doit refroidir longuement avant d'être tranché, sinon la mie devient gommeuse, comme beaucoup de pains au psyllium.

origin.note: Sorghum is an ancient African staple grain, but this single-flour, psyllium-bound, yeasted loaf format is a 21st-century gluten-free-baking technique, distinct from sorghum's traditional use in flatbreads like Sudanese kisra.

keeping.note: Must cool completely, 4-5 hours, before slicing or the crumb turns gummy; a common trait of gluten-free psyllium loaves.

summary.en: Whisk whole psyllium husk into the water; let sit a few minutes until gelled.
Combine sorghum flour, sugar, salt, yeast and baking powder in a separate bowl.
Mix the psyllium gel and oil into the dry ingredients, 5-10 minutes with an electric mixer, into a thick, sticky batter; do not add extra flour even though it looks wet.
Scrape into a lined 9 x 5 in metal loaf pan and smooth the top.
Rise in a warm spot (about 24°C) 1-2 hours until the dough reaches the rim.
Cool in the pan 5-10 minutes, then on a rack for a full 4-5 hours before slicing.

source.adaptation: Salt recorded at the midpoint of the source's 10-12g range.
